210101.english: Peter, an apostle of Jesus Christ, to the strangers scattered throughout Pontus, Galatia, Cappadocia, Asia, and Bithynia,
210101.cherokee: ᎠᏴ ᏈᏓ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᏫᏨᏲᏪᎳᏏ ᎢᏣᏗᎦᎴᏲᏨᎯ ᏋᏗᏱ ᎢᏤᏙᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎨᎴᏏᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎨᏆᏙᏏ ᎠᎴ ᎡᏏᏱ ᎠᎴ ᏈᏗᏂᏱ;
210101.phonetic: A-yv Qui-da Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv a-gi-nv-si-dv wi-tsv-yo-we-la-si i-tsa-di-ga-le-yo-tsv-hi Quv-di-yi i-tse-do-hi a-le Ge-le-si-yi a-le Ge-qua-do-si a-le E-si-yi a-le Qui-di-ni-yi;

210102.english: Elect according to the foreknowledge of God the Father, through sanctification of the Spirit, unto obedience and sprinkling of the blood of Jesus Christ: Grace unto you, and peace, be multiplied.
210102.cherokee: ᎡᏣᏑᏰᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᎦᏔᎰ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ, ᎬᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏅᎦᎸᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿ ᎭᏨᏗᏓᎴᎲᏍᎦ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᏚᏟᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎩᎬ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ; ᎦᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏣᏤᎵ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
210102.phonetic: E-tsa-su-ye-dv na-s-gi-ya na-ga-ta-ho U-ne-la-nv-hi A-ga-yv-li-ge-i, gv-ta-nv-hi u-da-nv-ga-lv-di ge-sv A-da-nv-do, na-s-gi na-hna tsv-di-da-le-hv-s-ga go-hi-yu-di ge-sv a-le a-s-du-tli-s-di ge-sv u-gi-gv Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv; Ga-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv a-le nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv u-tsa-ti i-tsa-tse-li ge-se-s-di.

210103.english: Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, which according to his abundant mercy hath begotten us again unto a lively hope by the resurrection of Jesus Christ from the dead,
210103.cherokee: ᎦᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏣᏘᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏥᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏥᎩᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎬᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏥᎩᏁᎸ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎢᎩᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎤᏲᎱᏒ ᏚᎴᎯᏌᏅ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ;^
210103.phonetic: Ga-lv-quo-do-di ge-se-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi na-s-gi U-ga-yv-li-ge Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ga-tse-li-ga, na-s-gi u-tsa-ti u-da-do-li-tsa-ti-yu ge-sv tsi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di ta-li-ne tsi-gi-na-nu-go-wi-sv u-du-gi gv-di ge-sv tsi-gi-ne-lv gv-ni-dv i-gi-go-wa-dv-di-yi nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi u-yo-hu-sv du-le-hi-sa-nv Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv;^

210104.english: To an inheritance incorruptible, and undefiled, and that fadeth not away, reserved in heaven for you,
210104.cherokee: ᏥᎩᏁᎸ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎠᏲᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏓᎭ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᎪᎸᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᏦᏒ ᎡᏥᏍᏆᏂᎪᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᏂᎯ,
210104.phonetic: Tsi-gi-ne-lv i-ga-tse-li i-yu-li-s-do-di tsu-gv-wa-lo-di a-yo-gi ni-ge-sv-na, a-le ga-da-ha ni-ge-sv-na, a-le a-s-go-lv-gi ni-ge-sv-na, tso-sv e-tsi-s-qua-ni-go-da-ne-lv-hi ni-hi,

210105.english: Who are kept by the power of God through faith unto salvation ready to be revealed in the last time.
210105.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏨᏗᏍᎬ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏗ ᏤᏥᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᎡᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏗᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏣᏛᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎬᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
210105.phonetic: Na-s-gi go-hi-yu-di ge-sv i-tsv-di-s-gv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-li-ni-gi-di-yu ge-sv gv-di tse-tsi-s-qua-ni-go-di e-tsi-s-de-lv-di ge-sv gv-di-s-gi, na-s-gi e-tsi-s-de-lv-di ge-sv tsa-dv-nv-i-s-di gv-ni-ge-sv i-gv-ne-di-yi u-li-s-qua-lv-di ge-se-s-di.

210106.english: Wherein ye greatly rejoice, though now for a season, if need be, ye are in heaviness through manifold temptations:
210106.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏣᏘ ᏥᏣᎵᎮᎵᎦ, ᎪᎯᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᏞᎦ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎡᎯᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏔᏩᏕᎦ ᎤᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎢᏥᎪᎵᏰᏍᎩ ᎢᏣᎵᏩᏛᎡᎲᎢ,
210106.phonetic: Na-s-gi na-hna u-tsa-ti tsi-tsa-li-he-li-ga, go-hi-s-gi-ni-no-nv tle-ga, i-yu-no o-si-yu ge-se-s-di, e-hi-s-di i-tsa-da-nv-ta-wa-de-ga u-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha tsu-da-le-nv-dv i-tsi-go-li-ye-s-gi i-tsa-li-wa-dv-e-hv-i,

210107.english: That the trial of your faith, being much more precious than of gold that perisheth, though it be tried with fire, might be found unto praise and honour and glory at the appearing of Jesus Christ:
210107.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒ ᎠᎪᎵᏰᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏟ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎠᏕᎸ ᏓᎶᏂᎨ ᎠᎪᎵᏰᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏲᎩ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏥᎸ ᎬᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᎪᎵᏰᎥᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᏱᏩᎵᏰᎢᎶᎦ ᎦᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎠᏰᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎦᎾᏄᎪᏥᎸ ᎢᏳᎢ.
210107.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-tso-hi-yu-sv a-go-li-ye-di ge-sv u-tli ga-lv-quo-di-yu e-s-ga-quo a-de-lv da-lo-ni-ge a-go-li-ye-di ge-sv na-s-gi a-yo-gi tsi-gi, na-s-quo a-tsi-lv gv-ta-nv-hi a-go-li-ye-v-hi yi-gi, yi-wa-li-ye-i-lo-ga ga-lv-quo-do-di ge-sv-i, a-le o-s-dv a-ye-lv-di ge-sv-i, a-le ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv-i, Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv ga-na-nu-go-tsi-lv i-yu-i.

210108.english: Whom having not seen, ye love; in whom, though now ye see him not, yet believing, ye rejoice with joy unspeakable and full of glory:
210108.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ [ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ] ᎡᏥᎪᎥᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᎡᏥᎨᏳᎭ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏁᏥᎪᏩᏘᏍᎬᎾ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎡᏦᎯᏳᎲᏍᎬᎢ ᎡᏣᎵᎮᎵᎦ ᎢᏨᏗᎭ ᎠᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎦᏃᎮᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏔᏅᎯ;
210108.phonetic: Na-s-gi [Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv] e-tsi-go-v-hi ni-ge-sv-na i-e-tsi-ge-yu-ha; a-le na-s-gi go-hi ge-sv ne-tsi-go-wa-ti-s-gv-na, a-se-no e-tso-hi-yu-hv-s-gv-i e-tsa-li-he-li-ga i-tsv-di-ha a-li-he-li-s-di ge-sv ga-no-he-di ni-ge-sv-na a-le ga-lv-quo-ta-nv-hi;

210109.english: Receiving the end of your faith, even the salvation of your souls.
210109.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎡᏣᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎭ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᎬᏩᎸᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏣᏓᏅᏙ ᏗᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
210109.phonetic: A-le e-tsa-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-ha i-tso-hi-yu-sv nu-s-dv u-gv-wa-lv-i, na-s-gi di-tsa-da-nv-do di-s-de-lv-di ge-sv-i.

210110.english: Of which salvation the prophets have inquired and searched diligently, who prophesied of the grace that should come unto you:
210110.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎣᏂᎨᏛᏅᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏲᎸᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏙᎴᎰᏒᎯ ᎤᏂᏁᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏂᎯ ᎡᏥᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;
210110.phonetic: Na-s-gi na a-li-s-de-lv-do-di ge-sv a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi o-s-dv o-ni-ge-dv-nv-hi a-le u-ni-yo-lv-hi, na-s-gi u-na-do-le-ho-sv-hi u-ni-ne-i-s-ta-nv-hi ni-hi e-tsi-do-li-s-di ge-sv-i;

210111.english: Searching what, or what manner of time the Spirit of Christ which was in them did signify, when it testified beforehand the sufferings of Christ, and the glory that should follow.
210111.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏲᎲᎩ ᎢᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏔᏂᏓᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎦᏛᎬᎢ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏯᎥᎢ, ᎢᎬᏱ ᎦᏰᎯ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏥᏂᎬᏁᎮ ᎤᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎣᏂ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᎢᏍᏗᏱ.
210111.phonetic: U-ni-yo-hv-gi i-yu ge-sv-i, a-le i-yu-li-s-ta-ni-da-s-di ge-sv ga-dv-gv-i A-da-nv-do Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li-ga na-s-gi u-ni-ya-v-i, i-gv-yi ga-ye-hi gv-ni-ge-sv tsi-ni-gv-ne-he u-gi-li-yo-i-s-di-yi Ga-lo-ne-dv a-le ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv o-ni u-na-nu-go-i-s-di-yi.

210112.english: Unto whom it was revealed, that not unto themselves, but unto us they did minister the things, which are now reported unto you by them that have preached the gospel unto you with the Holy Ghost sent down from heaven; which things the angels desire to look into.
210112.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎨᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ ᎤᏅᏒᏉ ᎾᎾᎵᏍᏕᎵᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᎩᏍᏕᎵᏍᎬᎢ ᎨᎩᏃᎮᎮᎸ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏥᏂᎨᏨᏁᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎨᏣᎵᏥᏙᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᏅᏗᏍᎬ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏓᏰᏥᏅᏏᏛ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏧᎾᏚᎵᎭ ᎤᏂᎪᎵᏰᏗᏱ.
210112.phonetic: Na-s-gi gv-ni-ge-sv i-ge-gv-ne-lv-hi tsi-ge-se-i u-nv-sv-quo na-na-li-s-de-li-s-gv-na ge-sv-i, a-yv-s-gi-ni ge-gi-s-de-li-s-gv-i ge-gi-no-he-he-lv na-s-gi go-hi gv-ni-ge-sv tsi-ni-ge-tsv-ne-ha na-s-gi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv ge-tsa-li-tsi-do-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi, a-nv-di-s-gv Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do ga-lv-la-di nv-da-ye-tsi-nv-si-dv; na-s-gi di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi tsu-na-du-li-ha u-ni-go-li-ye-di-yi.

210113.english: Wherefore gird up the loins of your mind, be sober, and hope to the end for the grace that is to be brought unto you at the revelation of Jesus Christ;
210113.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏗᏥᏠᎦ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎢᏣᎵᏏᎾᎯᏍᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎢᏨᏎᏍᏗ ᎡᏥᏁᏗᏱ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏂᎯ ᎡᏥᏲᎮᏗ ᏥᎩ ᎾᎯᏳ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎾᎬᏁᎸᎭ.
210113.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di di-tsi-tlo-ga de-tsa-da-nv-dv-i, i-tsa-li-si-na-hi-s-di-yu ge-se-s-di, a-le gv-li-s-qua-di-s-gi u-du-gi i-tsv-se-s-di e-tsi-ne-di-yi gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv ni-hi e-tsi-yo-he-di tsi-gi na-hi-yu Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv gv-ni-ge-sv na-gv-ne-lv-ha.

210114.english: As obedient children, not fashioning yourselves according to the former lusts in your ignorance:
210114.cherokee: ᎢᏦᎯᏳᎯᏍᏛ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏥᏂᏣᏍᏛ ᏥᏣᏚᎸᏅᎥᏍᎬ ᎾᎯᏳ ᏂᏥᎦᏔᎿᎭᎥᎾ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ;
210114.phonetic: I-tso-hi-yu-hi-s-dv ge-se-s-di, tle-s-di i-lv-hi-yu tsi-ni-tsa-s-dv tsi-tsa-du-lv-nv-v-s-gv na-hi-yu ni-tsi-ga-ta-hna-v-na tsi-ge-sv-gi;

210115.english: But as he which hath called you is holy, so be ye holy in all manner of conversation;
210115.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏥᏯᏅᏛ ᎠᏍᎦᎾᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏥᏍᎦᎾᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏂᏣᏛᎿᎭᏕᎬᎢ.
210115.phonetic: Na-s-gi-s-gi-ni i-tsi-ya-nv-dv a-s-ga-na-hi ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo ni-hi i-tsi-s-ga-na-hi ni-ge-sv-na ge-se-s-di ni-ga-v ni-tsa-dv-hna-de-gv-i.

210116.english: Because it is written, Be ye holy; for I am holy.
210116.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎳ, "ᎢᏥᏍᎦᎾ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᏴᏰᏃ ᏥᏍᎦᎾ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᎩ."
210116.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no ni-gv-nv go-we-la, "I-tsi-s-ga-na ni-ge-sv-na ge-se-s-di, a-yv-ye-no tsi-s-ga-na ni-ge-sv-na i-gi."

210117.english: And if ye call on the Father, who without respect of persons judgeth according to every man's work, pass the time of your sojourning here in fear:
210117.cherokee: ᎢᏳ ᎠᎴ ᎡᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏗᎦᎸᏉᏗᏍᎬᎾ ᏥᏕᎫᎪᏓᏁᎭ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎠᏂᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ, ᏂᎪᎯᎸ [ᎠᏂ] ᎢᏣᎴᏂᏙᎲᎢ ᎢᏤᏯᏔᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎢᏤᎲᎢ.
210117.phonetic: I-yu a-le e-tsa-da-do-li-s-da-ne-he-s-di A-ga-yv-li-ge-i, na-s-gi ni-di-ga-lv-quo-di-s-gv-na tsi-de-gu-go-da-ne-ha na-ni-v a-ni-si-yv-wi-ha nu-s-dv du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i, ni-go-hi-lv [a-ni] i-tsa-le-ni-do-hv-i i-tse-ya-ta-hi ge-se-s-di i-tse-hv-i.

210118.english: Forasmuch as ye know that ye were not redeemed with corruptible things, as silver and gold, from your vain conversation received by tradition from your fathers;
210118.cherokee: ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎭᏰᏃ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᏲᎩ, ᎠᏕᎸ ᎤᏁᎬ ᏯᏛᏅ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏕᎸ ᏓᎶᏂᎨ, ᎡᏣᎫᏴᏔᏅᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎡᎫᏓᎴᏒᎢ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎬᏙᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏣᎴᏂᏙᎸᎢ ᏗᏥᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᏗᎨᏥᏲᎯᏎᎸᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ,
210118.phonetic: I-tsi-ga-ta-ha-ye-no go-hu-s-di a-yo-gi, a-de-lv u-ne-gv ya-dv-nv a-le a-de-lv da-lo-ni-ge, e-tsa-gu-yv-ta-nv-hi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i, e-gu-da-le-sv-i go-hu-s-di gv-do-di ni-ge-sv-na i-tsa-le-ni-do-lv-i di-tsi-ga-yv-li-ge di-ge-tsi-yo-hi-se-lv-hi ge-sv-i,

210119.english: But with the precious blood of Christ, as of a lamb without blemish and without spot:
210119.cherokee: ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎩᎬ ᎡᏣᎫᏴᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᎩᎬ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎠᏫ-ᎠᎩᎾ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏄᎪᎸᏫ ᎠᎴ ᏄᏓᏓᎸᎾ;
210119.phonetic: Ga-lv-quo-di-yu-s-gi-ni gi-gv e-tsa-gu-yv-ta-nv-hi ge-sv-i, u-gi-gv Ga-lo-ne-dv na-s-gi-ya a-wi--a-gi-na go-hu-s-di nu-go-lv-wi a-le nu-da-da-lv-na;

210120.english: Who verily was foreordained before the foundation of the world, but was manifest in these last times for you,
210120.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎾᏥᎦᏔᎰᎢ ᎠᏏ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎾᏙᏢᏍᎬᎾ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎾᎬᏁᎴ ᎪᎯ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗ ᏕᎨᏌᏗᏒᎢ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ,
210120.phonetic: Na-s-gi u-do-hi-yu-hi na-tsi-ga-ta-ho-i a-si e-lo-hi na-do-tlv-s-gv-na tsi-ge-se-i; a-se-no gv-ni-ge-sv na-gv-ne-le go-hi u-li-s-qua-lv-di de-ge-sa-di-sv-i ni-hi i-tsa-li-s-de-lv-do-di,

210121.english: Who by him do believe in God, that raised him up from the dead, and gave him glory; that your faith and hope might be in God.
210121.cherokee: ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ ᏤᏦᎯᏳᎲᏍᎦ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏲᎱᏒ ᏥᏚᎴᏔᏁᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏧᏁᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎢᏨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᏗᏢ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
210121.phonetic: Ni-hi na-s-gi i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv tse-tso-hi-yu-hv-s-ga U-ne-la-nv-hi na-s-gi u-yo-hu-sv tsi-du-le-ta-ne-i a-le tsu-ne-le ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv-i; na-s-gi i-tso-hi-yu-sv a-le u-du-gi i-tsv-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi i-di-tlv i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

210122.english: Seeing ye have purified your souls in obeying the truth through the Spirit unto unfeigned love of the brethren, see that ye love one another with a pure heart fervently:
210122.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏗᏥᏅᎦᎸᏛ ᏥᎩ ᏗᏣᏓᏅᏙ ᏕᏥᎧᎾᏩᏛᏒ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏥᏅᏧᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅ, [ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ] ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏥᏨᏔᏅ, ᏄᏠᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏨᏙᏗᏱ ᏗᏥᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎢᏣᎵᏅᏟ, ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᏕᏣᏓᎨᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎦᏓᎭ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏥᎾᏫ.
210122.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no di-tsi-nv-ga-lv-dv tsi-gi di-tsa-da-nv-do de-tsi-ka-na-wa-dv-sv du-yu-go-dv tsi-nv-tsu-li-s-do-ta-nv, [Ga-lv-quo-di-yu] A-da-nv-do tsi-tsv-ta-nv, nu-tlo-na-s-dv-na a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv i-tsv-do-di-yi di-tsi-ge-yu-hi-yu i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi i-tsa-li-nv-tli, u-li-ni-gi-dv de-tsa-da-ge-yu-se-s-di i-tsv-di-s-ge-s-di ga-da-ha ni-ge-sv-na i-tsi-na-wi.

210123.english: Being born again, not of corruptible seed, but of incorruptible, by the word of God, which liveth and abideth for ever.
210123.cherokee: ᏔᎵᏁ ᎢᏣᏕᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᏲᎩ ᎤᎦᏔ ᎢᏣᏕᏔᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᏲᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎧᏃᎥᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏟᎵ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏃᏛ ᏥᎩ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎡᎯ ᏥᎩ.
210123.phonetic: Ta-li-ne i-tsa-de-nv-hi ge-sv-i, v-tla a-yo-gi u-ga-ta i-tsa-de-ta-nv-hi yi-gi, a-yo-gi-s-gi-ni ni-ge-sv-na, ka-no-v-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tli-li i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv na-s-gi gv-no-dv tsi-gi a-le ni-go-hi-lv e-hi tsi-gi.

210124.english: For all flesh is as grass, and all the glory of man as the flower of grass. The grass withereth, and the flower thereof falleth away:
210124.cherokee: ᏂᎦᎥᏰᏃ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎧᏃᏍᎦᏉ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᏓᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏴᏫ, ᎧᏁᏍᎦ ᎤᏥᎸᏒ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ.  ᎧᏁᏍᎦ ᎧᏴᏍᎪᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏥᎸᏒᎢ ᎦᏙᎠᏍᎪᎢ, ᎧᏃᎮᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎡᎭ.
210124.phonetic: Ni-ga-v-ye-no u-que-da-li ge-sv ka-no-s-ga-quo na-s-gi-ya-i, a-le ni-ga-v u-da-lv-quo-do-di ge-sv yv-wi, ka-ne-s-ga u-tsi-lv-sv na-s-gi-ya-i.  Ka-ne-s-ga ka-yv-s-go-i, a-le u-tsi-lv-sv-i ga-do-a-s-go-i, ka-no-he-dv-s-gi-ni U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-tse-li-ga ni-go-hi-lv e-ha.

210125.english: But the word of the Lord endureth for ever. And this is the word which by the gospel is preached unto you.
210125.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎡᏣᎵᏥᏙᏁᎲᎢ ᏤᏣᎵᏥᏙᏁᎭ.
210125.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a ka-no-he-dv na-s-gi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv e-tsa-li-tsi-do-ne-hv-i tse-tsa-li-tsi-do-ne-ha.

210201.english: Wherefore laying aside all malice, and all guile, and hypocrisies, and envies, and all evil speakings,
210201.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏂᏨᎦ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎤᏲ ᎨᏒᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎦᎶᏄᎮᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏠᎾᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏛᏳᎨᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎤᏲ ᏗᏓᏃᎮᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ,
210201.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-yv-dv ni-tsv-ga nu-da-le-sv u-yo ge-sv-i a-le nu-da-le-sv ga-lo-nu-he-dv a-le u-tlo-na-s-di ge-sv a-dv-yu-ge-di a-le nu-da-le-sv u-yo di-da-no-he-di ge-sv-i,

210202.english: As newborn babes, desire the sincere milk of the word, that ye may grow thereby:
210202.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎩᎳᎢ ᎤᎾᏕᏃᏅᎯ ᏗᏂᏲᎵ ᎤᏅᏗ ᏧᎾᏚᎵᏍᎪᎢ ᎢᏣᏚᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎦᎶ ᏄᎮᏛ ᏄᏓᏑᏴᏫ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏣᏛᎯᏍᏙᏗᏱ;
210202.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya gi-la-i u-na-de-no-nv-hi di-ni-yo-li u-nv-di tsu-na-du-li-s-go-i i-tsa-du-li-s-ge-s-di ga-lo-nu-he-dv nu-da-su-yv-wi ka-no-he-dv, na-s-gi di-tsa-dv-hi-s-do-di-yi;

210203.english: If so be ye have tasted that the Lord is gracious.

210204.english: To whom coming, as unto a living stone, disallowed indeed of men, but chosen of God, and precious,
210204.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏥᎷᏤᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏃᏛ ᏅᏯ ᎤᏂᏲᎢᏎᎸᎯᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᏴᏫ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏑᏰᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ,
210204.phonetic: Na-s-gi e-tsi-lu-tse-hv-i, na-s-gi gv-no-dv nv-ya u-ni-yo-i-se-lv-hi-s-gi-ni-no-nv u-do-hi-yu-hi yv-wi, a-se-no U-ne-la-nv-hi u-su-ye-dv a-le ga-lv-quo-di-yu,

210205.english: Ye also, as lively stones, are built up a spiritual house, an holy priesthood, to offer up spiritual sacrifices, acceptable to God by Jesus Christ.
210205.cherokee: ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏗᏨᏃᏛ ᏅᏯ ᎡᏣᏁᏍᎨᎲᎯ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᎢᏰᏨᏁᎸᎯ, ᎡᏥᎸᏉᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᏥᎸᎢᏤᎶᎯ, ᎡᏣᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎳᏍᏗ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᏰᎵᏉ ᏗᎬᎠᏓᏂᎸᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ.
210205.phonetic: Ni-hi na-s-quo di-tsv-no-dv nv-ya e-tsa-ne-s-ge-hv-hi a-da-nv-do a-da-ne-lv i-ye-tsv-ne-lv-hi, e-tsi-lv-quo-ta-nv-hi a-tsi-lv-i-tse-lo-hi, e-tsa-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-di-yi a-tsi-lv--ge-la-s-di a-da-nv-do u-gv-wa-li ye-li-quo di-gv-a-da-ni-lv-i-s-di ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi, Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv.

210206.english: Wherefore also it is contained in the scripture, Behold, I lay in Sion a chief corner stone, elect, precious: and he that believeth on him shall not be confounded.
210206.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎵᎯ-ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᏥᎲᎦ ᏌᏯᏂ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎤᏅᏏᏴ ᎠᏗ ᏅᏯ ᎠᏑᏰᏛ, ᎦᎸᏉᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏕᎰᎯᏍᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
210206.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di na-s-quo hi-a ni-gv-nv go-we-li-hi---Gv-ni-yu-quo tsi-hv-ga Sa-ya-ni nu-gv-wi-yu-sv u-nv-si-yv a-di nv-ya a-su-ye-dv, ga-lv-quo-di, a-le gi-lo na-s-gi go-hi-yu-hv-s-ge-s-di v-tla u-de-ho-hi-s-di yi-ge-se-s-di.

210207.english: Unto you therefore which believe he is precious: but unto them which be disobedient, the stone which the builders disallowed, the same is made the head of the corner,
210207.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏂᎯ ᎡᏦᎢᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᏥᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎡᏂᏰᎸᎠ; ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ Ꮎ ᎾᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎬᎾ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ "ᏅᏯ ᏗᎾᏁᏍᎨᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏲᎢᏎᎸᎯ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎤᏅᏏᏴ ᎠᏗ ᏄᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᎸ;"
210207.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di ni-hi e-tso-i-yu-hv-s-gi tsi-gi ga-lv-quo-di-yu e-ni-ye-lv-a; na-s-gi-s-gi-ni na na-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gv-na, na-s-gi na "nv-ya di-na-ne-s-ge-s-gi u-ni-yo-i-se-lv-hi nu-gv-wi-yu-sv u-nv-si-yv a-di nu-na-li-s-da-ne-lv;"

210208.english: And a stone of stumbling, and a rock of offence, even to them which stumble at the word, being disobedient: whereunto also they were appointed.
210208.cherokee: ᎠᎴ "ᏅᏯ ᎠᏓᎿᎭᏍᏆᎶᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᏅᏯ ᏗᏓᏙᏕᏍᏗᏍᎩ," ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏥᏚᏂᎾᏍᏆᎶᏍᏗᎭ, ᎾᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏥᏕᎨᏥᎧᏁᎢ.
210208.phonetic: A-le "nv-ya a-da-hna-s-qua-lo-s-di-s-gi a-le nv-ya di-da-do-de-s-di-s-gi," na-s-gi na ka-no-he-dv tsi-du-ni-na-s-qua-lo-s-di-ha, na-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gv-na ge-sv i-yu-s-di, na-s-gi i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-di-yi na-s-quo tsi-de-ge-tsi-ka-ne-i.

210209.english: But ye are a chosen generation, a royal priesthood, an holy nation, a peculiar people; that ye should shew forth the praises of him who hath called you out of darkness into his marvellous light:
210209.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎡᏣᏑᏰᏛ ᎢᏥᏠᏱ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎢᏥᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎢᏤᎶᎯ, ᎡᏥᎸᏉᏔᏅᎯ ᎢᏣᏓᏤᎵᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏣᏘ ᏗᏣᎬᏩᎳᏅᎯ ᏴᏫ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏨᏁᏗᏱ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎵᏏᎬᏫᏥᏯᏅᏛ, ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏳᏃ ᎢᎦ ᎦᎸᏌᏛ ᏫᏥᎧᏅᎯ;
210209.phonetic: Ni-hi-s-gi-ni e-tsa-su-ye-dv i-tsi-tlo-yi ge-sv-i, i-tsi-gv-wi-yu-hi a-tsi-lv--i-tse-lo-hi, e-tsi-lv-quo-ta-nv-hi i-tsa-da-tse-li-dv ge-sv-i, u-tsa-ti di-tsa-gv-wa-la-nv-hi yv-wi, na-s-gi gv-ni-ge-sv i-tsv-ne-di-yi a-tsi-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv na-s-gi tsu-li-si-gv-wi-tsi-ya-nv-dv, u-s-qua-ni-go-di-yu-no i-ga ga-lv-sa-dv wi-tsi-ka-nv-hi;

210210.english: Which in time past were not a people, but are now the people of God: which had not obtained mercy, but now have obtained mercy.
210210.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏥᎨᏒ ᎢᏣᏓᏤᎵᏛ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎪᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏥᎩ ᎢᏣᏓᏤᎵᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏤᎵ ᏂᏣᎵᏍᏔᏅ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᎡᏥᏙᎵᏨᎯ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ, ᎪᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏥᎩ ᎡᏥᏙᎵᏨᎯ.
210210.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-lv-hi-yu tsi-ge-sv i-tsa-da-tse-li-dv ni-ge-sv-na ge-se-i, go-hi-s-gi-ni tsi-gi i-tsa-da-tse-li-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-tse-li ni-tsa-li-s-ta-nv; na-s-gi v-tla e-tsi-do-li-tsv-hi yi-ge-se-i, go-hi-s-gi-ni tsi-gi e-tsi-do-li-tsv-hi.

210211.english: Dearly beloved, I beseech you as strangers and pilgrims, abstain from fleshly lusts, which war against the soul;
210211.cherokee: ᎢᏨᎨᏳᎢ, ᎢᏨᏔᏲᏎᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎨᏥᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏁᏙᎯ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗ ᏂᏣᏛᎦ, ᏗᏥᏲᎯ ᎤᏇᏓᎸ ᎤᎬᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏥᏓᏁᏓᎿᎭᏫᏯ.
210211.phonetic: I-tsv-ge-yu-i, i-tsv-ta-yo-se-ha, na-s-gi-ya ni-ge-tsi-ga-ta-hv-na a-le a-ne-do-hi i-yu-na-dv-ne-di ni-tsa-dv-ga, di-tsi-yo-hi u-que-da-lv u-gv-v-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi a-da-nv-do tsi-da-ne-da-hna-wi-ya.

210212.english: Having your conversation honest among the Gentiles: that, whereas they speak against you as evildoers, they may by your good works, which they shall behold, glorify God in the day of visitation.
210212.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᎴᏂᏙᎲ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᏁᎲ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᎾ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏣᏡᏗᏍᎬ ᎤᏲ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᏥᎨᏦᏎᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏕᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎠᏂᎪᏩᏘᏍᎬ ᏱᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᏯᏂᎸᏉᏓ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᏓᏩᏛᎯᎸᎭ.
210212.phonetic: A-le i-tsa-le-ni-do-hv o-s-dv ge-se-s-di a-ne-hv tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-na, na-s-gi ge-tsa-tlu-di-s-gv u-yo tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi tsi-ge-tso-se-ha, na-s-gi o-s-dv de-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv a-ni-go-wa-ti-s-gv yi-nv-da-ga-li-s-do-da ya-ni-lv-quo-da U-ne-la-nv-hi na-hi-yu i-ga da-wa-dv-hi-lv-ha.

210213.english: Submit yourselves to every ordinance of man for the Lord's sake: whether it be to the king, as supreme;
210213.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᏕᏦᎯᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏴᏫ ᏗᎨᎦᏁᎶᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ^ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ,
210213.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di, de-tso-hi-yu-se-s-di na-ni-v yv-wi di-ge-ga-ne-lo-di ge-sv-i^na-s-quo u-gv-wi-yu-hi nu-gv-wi-yu-sv ge-se-s-di,

210214.english: Or unto governors, as unto them that are sent by him for the punishment of evildoers, and for the praise of them that do well.
210214.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᎾᎵᏍᏕᎵᏍᎩᏉ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏙᏓᏳᏅᏏᏛ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏥᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏲ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎨᏥᎸᏉᏙᏗᏱ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ.
210214.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo a-na-li-s-de-li-s-gi-quo ge-se-s-di na-s-gi ni-do-da-yu-nv-si-dv U-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-tsi-gi-li-yo-i-s-do-di-yi u-yo tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi, a-le ge-tsi-lv-quo-do-di-yi o-s-dv tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi.

210215.english: For so is the will of God, that with well doing ye may put to silence the ignorance of foolish men:
210215.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏏᏳ ᏕᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎡᎳᏪ ᏗᏨᏗᏱ ᎾᏂᎦᏔᎿᎭᎥᎾ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏁᎫ ᏴᏫ.
210215.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no hi-a o-si-yu u-ye-lv-di U-ne-la-nv-hi, na-s-gi o-si-yu de-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv e-la-we di-tsv-di-yi na-ni-ga-ta-hna-v-na a-le u-ni-ne-gu yv-wi.

210216.english: As free, and not using your liberty for a cloke of maliciousness, but as the servants of God.
210216.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᏗᎨᏥᎾᏝᎥᎾ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ, ᎥᏝᏍᏗ ᎠᏗᎾ ᏂᏕᏥᎾᏝᎥᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏱᏨᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏱᏧᏢᎥᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏲ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏧᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ.
210216.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya ni-di-ge-tsi-na-tla-v-na i-yu-na-dv-ne-di ni-tsa-dv-ne-he-s-di, v-tla-s-di a-di-na ni-de-tsi-na-tla-v-na ge-sv yi-tsv-di-s-ge-s-di yi-tsu-tlv-v-s-ge-s-di u-yo di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i, U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni tsu-nv-si-da-s-di i-yu-na-dv-ne-di ni-tsa-dv-ne-he-s-di.

210217.english: Honour all men. Love the brotherhood. Fear God. Honour the king.
210217.cherokee: ᏕᏥᎸᏉᏕᏍᏗ ᎾᏂᎥᎢ; ᏕᏥᎨᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏢᎢ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎡᏥᎾᏰᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎡᏥᎸᏉᏆᏍᏗ.
210217.phonetic: De-tsi-lv-quo-de-s-di na-ni-v-i; de-tsi-ge-yu-se-s-di a-na-li-nv-tlv-i; U-ne-la-nv-hi e-tsi-na-ye-s-ge-s-di; u-gv-wi-yu-hi e-tsi-lv-quo-qua-s-di.

210218.english: Servants, be subject to your masters with all fear; not only to the good and gentle, but also to the froward.
210218.cherokee: ᏤᏥᎾᏝᎢ, ᏕᏦᎯᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᏗᎨᏥᎾᏝᎢ ᎤᎶᏘ ᎦᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᎥᏞᏍᏗ ᎠᏃᏍᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᎤᏅᏒ ᏱᏗᏦᎯᏳᏎᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏂᎾᎸᏣᏘ.
210218.phonetic: Tse-tsi-na-tla-i, de-tso-hi-yu-se-s-di di-ge-tsi-na-tla-i u-lo-ti ga-na-ye-hi-s-di i-tsv-di-s-ge-s-di; v-tle-s-di a-no-s-dv a-le u-na-da-nv-ti u-nv-sv yi-di-tso-hi-yu-se-s-di, na-s-quo-s-gi-ni u-ni-na-lv-tsa-ti.

210219.english: For this is thankworthy, if a man for conscience toward God endure grief, suffering wrongfully.
210219.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏓᏅᏛ ᎤᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏱᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎬᏂᏗᏳ ᏱᎩ ᎠᎩᎵᏲᎬᎢ, ᏂᏚᏳᎪᏛᎾ ᎠᏥᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ.
210219.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no hi-a ga-lv-quo-di-yu, i-yu-no gi-lo U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-da-nv-dv u-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv yi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha gv-ni-di-yu yi-gi a-gi-li-yo-gv-i, ni-du-yu-go-dv-na a-tsi-gi-li-yo-i-s-di-s-gv-i.

210220.english: For what glory is it, if, when ye be buffeted for your faults, ye shall take it patiently? but if, when ye do well, and suffer for it, ye take it patiently, this is acceptable with God.
210220.cherokee: ᎦᏙᎨᏃ ᎦᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎤᏣᏘᏂ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎸ ᎢᏥᏍᏛᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎡᏥᎵᎥᏂᎮᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏂᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᎩᎵᏲᎨᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏂᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᎢ.
210220.phonetic: Ga-do-ge-no ga-lv-quo-do-di ni-ga-li-s-di-ha, i-yu-no u-tsa-ti-ni ni-tsa-dv-ne-lv i-tsi-s-dv-di-s-ge-s-di e-tsi-li-v-ni-he-s-di i-tsv-ni-di-yu ge-se-s-di; i-yu-s-gi-ni o-s-dv ni-tsa-dv-ne-he-s-di a-le i-tsi-gi-li-yo-ge-s-di i-tsv-ni-di-yu ge-se-s-di, na-s-gi o-s-dv a-ye-li ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi a-da-nv-te-s-gv-i.

210221.english: For even hereunto were ye called: because Christ also suffered for us, leaving us an example, that ye should follow his steps:
210221.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎡᏥᏯᏅᏛ; ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᎩᎩᎵᏲᏤᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᎩᎯᏰᎴ ᏗᎩᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏪᏙᎸ ᏗᏥᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ.
210221.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di-yi e-tsi-ya-nv-dv; Ga-lo-ne-dv-ye-no na-s-quo i-gi-gi-li-yo-tse-le-i, a-le i-gi-hi-ye-le di-gi-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di, na-s-gi u-we-do-lv di-tsi-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-yi.

210222.english: Who did no sin, neither was guile found in his mouth:
210222.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏍᎦᏅᏤᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎶᏄᎮᏛ ᏯᏥᏩᏛᎡᎴ ᎠᎰᎵ;
210222.phonetic: Na-s-gi v-tla yu-s-ga-nv-tse-i, v-tla a-le ga-lo-nu-he-dv ya-tsi-wa-dv-e-le a-ho-li;

210223.english: Who, when he was reviled, reviled not again; when he suffered, he threatened not; but committed himself to him that judgeth righteously:
210223.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏰᏥᏐᏢᏔᏅ, ᎥᏝ ᏳᏞᏤ ᏱᎬᏩᏓᏐᏢᏔᏁᎢ; ᎤᎩᎵᏲᏨᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏁᏤᎢ; ᏚᏓᏲᎯᏎᎴᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏗᎫᎪᏓᏁᎯ.
210223.phonetic: Na-s-gi ga-ye-tsi-so-tlv-ta-nv, v-tla yu-tle-tse yi-gv-wa-da-so-tlv-ta-ne-i; u-gi-li-yo-tsv-no v-tla yu-ne-tse-i; du-da-yo-hi-se-le-quo-s-gi-ni na-s-gi du-yu-go-dv di-gu-go-da-ne-hi.

210224.english: Who his own self bare our sins in his own body on the tree, that we, being dead to sins, should live unto righteousness: by whose stripes ye were healed.
210224.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎩᏎ ᎢᏗᏍᎦᎾᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎠᏰᎸ ᏡᎬ ᏧᎩᎵᏲᏤᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᏗᎩᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏍᎦᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏗᏢ, ᏗᏛᏃᏛ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏗᏢ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏥᎵᎥᏂᎸᎢ ᎢᏣᏗᏫᏍᏗᎭ.
210224.phonetic: Na-s-gi u-wa-sv ge-sv u-gi-se i-di-s-ga-na-hi-yu ge-sv u-wa-sv a-ye-lv tlu-gv tsu-gi-li-yo-tse-i, na-s-gi a-yv di-gi-yo-hu-sv-hi ge-sv a-s-ga-nv-i-s-di ge-sv i-di-tlv, di-dv-no-dv i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi du-yu-go-dv i-di-tlv ge-sv-i; na-s-gi a-tsi-li-v-ni-lv-i i-tsa-di-wi-s-di-ha.

210225.english: For ye were as sheep going astray; but are now returned unto the Shepherd and Bishop of your souls.
210225.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏰᏃ ᎠᏫ ᎤᎾᎴᏲᎥᎯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎨᏎᎢ; ᎪᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏣᏨᏒ ᎡᏥᎷᏤᎸ ᎠᏫ-ᏗᎦᏘᏯ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏣᏓᏅᏙ ᏗᎦᏘᏯ.
210225.phonetic: Ni-hi-ye-no a-wi u-na-le-yo-v-hi na-s-gi-ya ge-se-i; go-hi-s-gi-ni ge-sv i-tsa-tsv-sv e-tsi-lu-tse-lv A-wi--di-ga-ti-ya a-le di-tsa-da-nv-do Di-ga-ti-ya.

210301.english: Likewise, ye wives, be in subjection to your own husbands; that, if any obey not the word, they also may without the word be won by the conversation of the wives;
210301.cherokee: ᎾᏍᏉᏃ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏥᎨᏴ ᏗᏦᎯᏳᎯᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏗᎨᏥᏰᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏂᏓᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏕᎬᎾ ᏱᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎬᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏱᎨᏥᏎᎪᎩᏍᏓ [ᎠᏂᎪᏩᏘᏍᎬ] ᏄᏍᏛ ᎢᏣᎴᏂᏙᎲ ᎢᏥᎨᏴ,
210301.phonetic: Na-s-quo-no ni-hi i-tsi-ge-yv di-tso-hi-yu-hi-yu ge-se-s-di di-ge-tsi-ye-hi, na-s-gi i-yu-no gi-lo ka-no-he-dv ni-da-ni-ka-hna-wa-de-gv-na yi-gi, na-s-gi na-s-quo ka-no-he-dv gv-di ni-ge-sv-na yi-ge-tsi-se-go-gi-s-da [a-ni-go-wa-ti-s-gv] nu-s-dv i-tsa-le-ni-do-hv i-tsi-ge-yv,

210302.english: While they behold your chaste conversation coupled with fear.
210302.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᎪᏩᏗᏍᎬ ᎤᏲ ᏄᏓᏑᏴᎾ ᎢᏣᎴᏂᏙᎲ ᎤᎵᏠᏯᏍᏛ ᎦᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
210302.phonetic: A-le a-ni-go-wa-di-s-gv u-yo nu-da-su-yv-na i-tsa-le-ni-do-hv u-li-tlo-ya-s-dv ga-na-ye-hi-s-di ge-sv-i.

210303.english: Whose adorning let it not be that outward adorning of plaiting the hair, and of wearing of gold, or of putting on of apparel;
210303.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏕᏣᏣᏅᏍᎬ ᎥᏝᏍᏗ ᎦᏚᎢᏉ ᎡᎯ ᎠᏣᏅᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏗᏰᎬ ᎠᏍᏕᏯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏕᎸᏓᎶᏂᎨ ᎠᏣᏅᏙᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏄᏬ ᏛᏄᏬᏍᎬᎢ,
210303.phonetic: A-le de-tsa-tsa-nv-s-gv v-tla-s-di ga-du-i-quo e-hi a-tsa-nv-di ge-sv yi-ge-se-s-di, na-s-gi o-s-di-ye-gv a-s-de-ya-s-di ge-sv-i a-le a-de-lv-da-lo-ni-ge a-tsa-nv-do-di, a-le di-nu-wo dv-nu-wo-s-gv-i,

210304.english: But let it be the hidden man of the heart, in that which is not corruptible, even the ornament of a meek and quiet spirit, which is in the sight of God of great price.
210304.cherokee: ᎤᏕᎵᏒᏍᎩᏂ ᎣᏓᏅᏛ ᎡᎯ ᏴᏫ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏲᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏅᏘ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏙᏗᎧᏂᏍᎬ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᏥᎩ.
210304.phonetic: U-de-li-sv-s-gi-ni o-da-nv-dv e-hi yv-wi ge-se-s-di, na-s-gi a-yo-gi ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi, na-s-gi u-da-do-li-s-di a-le u-da-nv-ti a-da-nv-do, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi do-di-ka-ni-s-gv u-tsa-ti tsu-gv-wa-lo-di tsi-gi.

210305.english: For after this manner in the old time the holy women also, who trusted in God, adorned themselves, being in subjection unto their own husbands:
210305.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎾᎾᏛᏁᎮ ᎡᏘ ᎠᏃᏍᏛ ᎠᏂᎨᏴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎾᏓᏍᎦᏍᏙᏗᏍᎩ ᏓᎾᏣᏅᏍᎨᎢ, ᏚᏃᎯᏳᎭ ᏗᎬᏩᏂᏰᎯ,
210305.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no na-s-quo na-na-dv-ne-he e-ti a-no-s-dv a-ni-ge-yv U-ne-la-nv-hi a-na-da-s-ga-s-do-di-s-gi da-na-tsa-nv-s-ge-i, du-no-hi-yu-ha di-gv-wa-ni-ye-hi,

210306.english: Even as Sara obeyed Abraham, calling him lord: whose daughters ye are, as long as ye do well, and are not afraid with any amazement.
210306.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏎᎵ ᎢᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎨ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ, ᏍᎩᎾᏝᎢ ᏥᎪᏎᎮᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏪᏥ ᏥᏂᏣᎵᏍᏗᎭ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏱᏗᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏂᏥᏍᎦᎢᎲᎾ ᏱᎩ.
210306.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya Se-li i-go-hi-yu-hv-s-ge E-qua-ha-mi, s-gi-na-tla-i tsi-go-se-he-i, na-s-gi tsu-we-tsi tsi-ni-tsa-li-s-di-ha, i-yu-no o-s-dv yi-di-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ha, a-le go-hu-s-di ni-tsi-s-ga-i-hv-na yi-gi.

210307.english: Likewise, ye husbands, dwell with them according to knowledge, giving honour unto the wife, as unto the weaker vessel, and as being heirs together of the grace of life; that your prayers be not hindered.
210307.cherokee: ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏥᏍᎦᏯ ᎢᏣᏁᎳᏛᎭ ᏗᏣᏓᎵᎢ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᏥᎸᏉᏕᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏗᎦᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᏥᎩ ᏗᏂᏩᎾᎦᎳᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎦᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᏥᎩ ᎠᏖᏆᎶᎯ ᎣᏤᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏩᎦᏗᏯ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎡᏥᏁᎸᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᏲᏍᏙᏗᏍᎩ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
210307.phonetic: Ni-hi na-s-quo i-tsi-s-ga-ya i-tsa-ne-la-dv-ha di-tsa-da-li-i na-s-gi-ya i-ya-dv-ne-di ge-sv i-tsi-ga-ta-hv-i, a-le de-tsi-lv-quo-de-s-di na-s-gi-ya di-ga-lv-quo-do-di tsi-gi di-ni-wa-na-ga-la-i, a-le di-ga-lv-quo-do-di tsi-gi a-te-qua-lo-hi o-tse-li ge-sv gv-wa-ga-di-ya gv-ni-dv e-tsi-ne-lv-i; na-s-gi-no tle-s-di i-tsa-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv go-hu-s-di a-yo-s-do-di-s-gi yi-ge-se-s-di.

210308.english: Finally, be ye all of one mind, having compassion one of another, love as brethren, be pitiful, be courteous:
210308.cherokee: ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗᏃ ᎨᏒᎢ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏌᏉᏉ ᏂᏕᏨᏁᏍᏗ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ; ᏕᏣᏓᏙᎵᎨᏍᏗ; ᏕᏣᏓᎨᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᎵᏅᏢᎢ; ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏣᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ;
210308.phonetic: U-li-s-qua-lv-di-no ge-sv-i ni-ga-di-yu sa-quo-quo ni-de-tsv-ne-s-di de-tsa-da-nv-dv-i; de-tsa-da-do-li-ge-s-di; de-tsa-da-ge-yu-se-s-di i-tsa-li-nv-tlv-i; i-tsa-da-do-li-tsa-di-yu ge-se-s-di; i-tsa-da-do-li-s-di ge-se-s-di;

210309.english: Not rendering evil for evil, or railing for railing: but contrariwise blessing; knowing that ye are thereunto called, that ye should inherit a blessing.
210309.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᎤᏲ ᏁᏨᏁᎲ ᏱᏣᏞᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏲ ᏱᏂᏣᏓᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏰᏥᏐᏢᏔᏅ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏣᏞᎨᏍᏗ ᏱᎨᏣᏓᏐᏢᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎣᏍᏛᏉᏍᏗᏂ ᎨᏥᏁᏤᎮᏍᏗ; ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎭᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏣᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᎡᏥᏯᏅᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏣᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎡᏥᏁᏤᏗᏱ.
210309.phonetic: Tle-s-di u-yo ne-tsv-ne-hv yi-tsa-tle-ge-s-di u-yo yi-ni-tsa-da-dv-ne-he-s-di, a-le ga-ye-tsi-so-tlv-ta-nv tle-s-di yi-tsa-tle-ge-s-di yi-ge-tsa-da-so-tlv-di-s-ge-s-di, o-s-dv-quo-s-di-ni ge-tsi-ne-tse-he-s-di; i-tsi-ga-ta-ha-ye-no na-s-gi i-tsa-dv-ne-di-yi e-tsi-ya-nv-dv ge-sv-i, na-s-gi i-tsa-tse-li i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi o-s-dv e-tsi-ne-tse-di-yi.

210310.english: For he that will love life, and see good days, let him refrain his tongue from evil, and his lips that they speak no guile:
210310.cherokee: "ᎩᎶᏰᏃ ᎬᏅ ᎤᎨᏳᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᎦ ᏧᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᏩᏲᏍᏙᏓᏏ ᎦᏃᎪᎢ ᎤᏲ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏚᎭᏁᎦᎸ ᎦᎶᏄᎮᏛ ᎤᏁᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ;
210310.phonetic: "Gi-lo-ye-no gv-nv u-ge-yu-se-s-di, a-le o-s-dv i-ga tsu-go-wa-dv-di-yi u-du-li-s-ge-s-di, wa-yo-s-do-da-si ga-no-go-i u-yo ge-sv-i, du-ha-ne-ga-lv ga-lo-nu-he-dv u-ne-i-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na;

210311.english: Let him eschew evil, and do good; let him seek peace, and ensue it.
210311.cherokee: ᎠᏓᏅᎡᎮᏍᏗ ᎤᏲ ᎨᏒᎢ ᎣᏍᏛᏃ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ; ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏲᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏓᎧᎿᎭᏩᏕᎨᏍᏗ.
210311.phonetic: A-da-nv-e-he-s-di u-yo ge-sv-i o-s-dv-no du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-he-s-di; nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv ge-sv u-yo-he-s-di a-le na-s-gi da-ka-hna-wa-de-ge-s-di.

210312.english: For the eyes of the Lord are over the righteous, and his ears are open unto their prayers: but the face of the Lord is against them that do evil.
210312.cherokee: ᏱᎰᏩᏰᏃ ᏗᎦᏙᎵ ᏓᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎦᎴᏂ ᏚᏛᏓᏍᏗ ᎠᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎤᎧᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᏱᎰᏩ ᏕᏡᏔᏅ ᎤᏲ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ."
210312.phonetic: Yi-ho-wa-ye-no di-ga-do-li da-ka-hna-wa-di-do u-na-da-nv-ti, a-le di-ga-le-ni du-dv-da-s-di a-na-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv-i, u-ka-dv-s-gi-ni Yi-ho-wa de-tlu-ta-nv u-yo tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi."

210313.english: And who is he that will harm you, if ye be followers of that which is good?
210313.cherokee: ᎦᎪᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏏᏅ ᏱᏂᏨᎦ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏥᏍᏓᏩᏕᎩ ᏱᎩ?
210313.phonetic: Ga-go-no na-s-gi o-si-nv yi-ni-tsv-ga i-yu-no o-s-dv ge-sv i-tsi-s-da-wa-de-gi yi-gi?

210314.english: But and if ye suffer for righteousness' sake, happy are ye: and be not afraid of their terror, neither be troubled;
210314.cherokee: ᎢᏳ ᎠᎴ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᎩᎵᏲᎨᏍᏗ, ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛᏉ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.  ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏥᏍᎦᎢᎮᏍᏗ ᎤᏂᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏣᏕᏯᏔᏁᎮᏍᏗ;
210314.phonetic: I-yu a-le du-yu-go-dv ge-sv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di i-tsi-gi-li-yo-ge-s-di, nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv-quo ge-se-s-di.  A-le tle-s-di yi-tsi-s-ga-i-he-s-di u-ni-na-ye-hi-s-di-yu ge-sv-i, a-le tle-s-di yi-tsa-de-ya-ta-ne-he-s-di;

210315.english: But sanctify the Lord God in your hearts: and be ready always to give an answer to every man that asketh you a reason of the hope that is in you with meekness and fear:
210315.cherokee: ᎡᏥᎸᏉᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᏱᎰᏩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏙᏗᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ.  ᎠᎴ ᏯᏃᏉ ᎢᏨᏛᏅᎢᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎩᎶ ᎨᏣᏛᏛᎲᏍᎩ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎢᏨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᏗᏥᏃᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᏓᏅᏘ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏨᏙᏗᏱ.
210315.phonetic: E-tsi-lv-quo-di-s-ge-s-di-s-gi-ni Yi-ho-wa U-ne-la-nv-hi do-di-tsa-da-nv-dv-i.  A-le ya-no-quo i-tsv-dv-nv-i-s-de-s-di na-ni-v gi-lo ge-tsa-dv-dv-hv-s-gi u-du-gi i-tsv-sv u-gv-wa-li, di-tsi-no-ne-di-yi u-da-nv-ti a-le u-na-ye-hi-s-di ge-sv i-tsv-do-di-yi.

210316.english: Having a good conscience; that, whereas they speak evil of you, as of evildoers, they may be ashamed that falsely accuse your good conversation in Christ.
210316.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᏍᏆᏂᎪᏕᏍᏗ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏗᎫᎪᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏐᏅ ᏥᎨᏥᏃᎮᎭ ᎤᏲ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᏥᎨᏦᏎᎭ, ᏯᎾᏕᎰᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᎨᏥᏃᎮᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏣᎴᏂᏙᎲ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏕᏥᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏒᎢ ᎠᏂᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎩ.
210316.phonetic: A-le i-tsi-s-qua-ni-go-de-s-di o-s-dv di-gu-go-do-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi u-so-nv tsi-ge-tsi-no-he-ha u-yo tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi tsi-ge-tso-se-ha, ya-na-de-ho-hi na-s-gi ga-ye-go-gi ge-tsi-no-he-s-gi o-s-dv i-tsa-le-ni-do-hv Ga-lo-ne-dv de-tsi-ka-hna-wa-di-sv-i a-ni-ne-i-s-di-s-gi.

210317.english: For it is better, if the will of God be so, that ye suffer for well doing, than for evil doing.
210317.cherokee: ᎤᏟᏰᏃ ᎣᏏᏳ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏄᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏕᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ, ᎠᏃ ᎤᏲ ᏕᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎢᏥᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗᏱ.
210317.phonetic: U-tli-ye-no o-si-yu, na-s-gi yi-nu-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi a-da-nv-te-s-gv-i, na-s-gi i-tsi-gi-li-yo-i-s-di-yi o-s-dv de-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i, a-no u-yo de-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv i-tsi-gi-li-yo-i-s-di-yi.

210318.english: For Christ also hath once suffered for sins, the just for the unjust, that he might bring us to God, being put to death in the flesh, but quickened by the Spirit:
210318.cherokee: ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏌᏉ ᏄᎩᎵᏲᏤ ᎠᏍᎦᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏍᏛᏕᎢ, ᎠᏍᎦᎾ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᎾ ᏚᎩᎵᏲᏤᎴᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏱ ᏫᏗᎦᏘᏃᎯᏍᏗᏱ; ᎠᏥᎴᎢ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏩᏂᏕᎢ.
210318.phonetic: Ga-lo-ne-dv-ye-no na-s-quo sa-quo nu-gi-li-yo-tse a-s-ga-nv-i-s-di ge-sv u-s-dv-de-i, a-s-ga-na ni-ge-sv-na a-ni-s-ga-na du-gi-li-yo-tse-le-i, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi-yi wi-di-ga-ti-no-hi-s-di-yi; a-tsi-le-i u-que-da-li ge-sv-i, a-se-no A-da-nv-do u-wa-ni-de-i.

210319.english: By which also he went and preached unto the spirits in prison;
210319.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ [ᎠᏓᏅᏙ] ᎤᏩᏔᏁ ᎤᏪᏅᏎ ᏫᏚᎵᏥᏙᏁᎴ ᏗᏓᏅᏙ ᏗᏓᏍᏚᏗᏱ ᏣᏂᏯᎠ,
210319.phonetic: Na-s-gi na-s-quo [a-da-nv-do] u-wa-ta-ne u-we-nv-se wi-du-li-tsi-do-ne-le di-da-nv-do di-da-s-du-di-yi tsa-ni-ya-a,

210320.english: Which sometime were disobedient, when once the longsuffering of God waited in the days of Noah, while the ark was a preparing, wherein few, that is, eight souls were saved by water.
210320.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏄᏃᎯᏳᏒᎾ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎬᏂᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏣᎦᏘᏰᎢ, ᏃᏯ ᎾᎯᏳ ᏤᎥᎢ, ᏣᏛᏅᎢᏍᏗᏍᎨ ᏥᏳ, ᎾᎿᎭᎢᎸᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏁᎳᏉ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᏥᎨᏥᏍᏕᎸᎮᎢ, ᎠᎹ ᏥᎨᏥᏍᏕᎸᏔᏁᎢ;
210320.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-lv-hi-yu nu-no-hi-yu-sv-na tsi-ge-se-i, na-hi-yu U-ne-la-nv-hi gv-ni-di-yu ge-sv tsa-ga-ti-ye-i, No-ya na-hi-yu tse-v-i, tsa-dv-nv-i-s-di-s-ge tsi-yu, na-hna i-lv-s-gi na-s-gi tsu-ne-la-quo i-ya-ni-dv tsi-ge-tsi-s-de-lv-he-i, a-ma tsi-ge-tsi-s-de-lv-ta-ne-i;

210321.english: The like figure whereunto even baptism doth also now save us (not the putting away of the filth of the flesh, but the answer of a good conscience toward God,) by the resurrection of Jesus Christ:
210321.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏗᏓᏬᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎩᏍᏕᎵᎭ; ᎥᏝ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎾᎬᏁᎲ ᎠᏰᎸ ᎦᏓᎭ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎧᏁᏤᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎬᏙᏗ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎩᏍᏕᎵᎭ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏚᎴᎯᏌᏅ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ,
210321.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo di-da-wo-s-di ge-sv go-hi ge-sv i-gi-s-de-li-ha; v-tla i-yv-dv na-gv-ne-hv a-ye-lv ga-da-ha ge-sv-i, ka-ne-tse-di-s-gi-ni U-ne-la-nv-hi gv-do-di o-s-dv a-da-nv-te-di ge-sv i-gi-s-de-li-ha nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha du-le-hi-sa-nv Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv,

210322.english: Who is gone into heaven, and is on the right hand of God; angels and authorities and powers being made subject unto him.
210322.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏭᎶᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏬᎸ ᎠᎦᏘᏏᏗᏢ ᏭᏬᎳ, ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎨᎦᏁᎶᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᏗᎬᏩᏁᎶᏗ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ.
210322.phonetic: Na-s-gi ga-lv-la-di wu-lo-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-wo-lv a-ga-ti-si-di-tlv wu-wo-la, di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi-no a-le di-ge-ga-ne-lo-di a-le nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv di-gv-wa-ne-lo-di nu-li-s-ta-nv.

210401.english: Forasmuch then as Christ hath suffered for us in the flesh, arm yourselves likewise with the same mind: for he that hath suffered in the flesh hath ceased from sin;
210401.cherokee: ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏃ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎩᎩᎵᏲᏤᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏙᏗ ᏂᏨᎦ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ Ꮎ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎩᎵᏲᏨᎯ ᏥᎨᏐᎢ ᏚᏲᏐ ᎠᏍᎦᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ,
210401.phonetic: Ga-lo-ne-dv-no u-que-da-li ge-sv i-gi-gi-li-yo-tse-lv-hi tsi-gi, ni-hi na-s-quo na-s-gi i-yu-s-di a-da-nv-do i-tsa-li-s-ga-s-do-do-di ni-tsv-ga; na-s-gi-ye-no na u-que-da-li ge-sv u-gi-li-yo-tsv-hi tsi-ge-so-i du-yo-so a-s-ga-nv-i-s-di ge-sv-i,

210402.english: That he no longer should live the rest of his time in the flesh to the lusts of men, but to the will of God.
210402.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᏕᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎤᏇᏓᎸ ᎢᎪᎯᏛ ᎤᎴᏂᏓᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏴᏫ ᎤᎾᏚᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
210402.phonetic: Na-s-gi hna-quo u-de-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi ni-go-hi-lv u-que-da-lv i-go-hi-dv u-le-ni-da-s-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi yv-wi u-na-du-lv-di ge-sv-i, U-ne-la-nv-hi-quo-s-gi-ni o-si-yu u-ye-lv-di ge-sv-i.

210403.english: For the time past of our life may suffice us to have wrought the will of the Gentiles, when we walked in lasciviousness, lusts, excess of wine, revellings, banquetings, and abominable idolatries:
210403.cherokee: ᏰᎵᏉᏰᏃ ᏱᎩᏰᎸᎭ ᎦᏳᎳ ᎢᎦᎴᏂᏙᎸ ᏕᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏂᎦᏔᎾᎥᎾ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᏥᏕᏙᎲ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᏗᏂᏏᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏚᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎩᎦᎨ-ᎠᏗᏔᏍᏗ ᎬᏓᏴᏍᏕᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎵᏍᎦᎾᏩᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᎾᏗᏔᏍᎬ ᎨᎳᏗᏓᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᏚᏳᎪᏛᎾ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᏰᎸᎯ ᏗᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;
210403.phonetic: Ye-li-quo-ye-no yi-gi-ye-lv-ha ga-yu-la i-ga-le-ni-do-lv de-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv o-si-yu u-ni-ye-lv-di ge-sv na-ni-ga-ta-na-v-na, na-hi-yu tsi-de-do-hv u-de-li-dv di-ni-si-di ge-sv-i, a-le a-du-lv-di ge-sv-i, a-le gi-ga-ge--a-di-ta-s-di gv-da-yv-s-de-s-di-s-gi ge-sv-i, a-le a-li-s-ga-na-wa-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le da-na-di-ta-s-gv ge-la-di-da-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le ni-du-yu-go-dv-na u-ne-la-nv-hi di-ye-lv-hi di-da-do-li-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i;

210404.english: Wherein they think it strange that ye run not with them to the same excess of riot, speaking evil of you:
210404.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏳ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᎭ, ᎾᎿᎭᏂᏣᎢᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎾᎢᏒ ᏩᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᎶᏒᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᎵᏓᏍᏗ ᏗᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏐᏅ ᎨᏥᏃᎮᏍᎬᎢ;
210404.phonetic: Na-s-gi u-s-qua-ni-go-di-yu u-ni-ye-lv-ha, na-hna ni-tsa-i-sv-na ge-sv a-na-i-sv wa-ni-ga-dv u-lo-sv-s-ta-nv-hi u-yo i-ya-dv-ne-li-da-s-di di-ge-sv-i, na-s-gi u-so-nv ge-tsi-no-he-s-gv-i;

210405.english: Who shall give account to him that is ready to judge the quick and the dead.
210405.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏅᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᎦᏔᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎬᏩᎴᎢ ᏧᎵᏁᏃᏗ ᏧᏭᎪᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᏗᏅᏃᏛ ᎠᎴ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ.
210405.phonetic: Na-s-gi gv-ni-ge-sv i-yu-nv-ne-di ge-se-s-di a-ga-ta-hv na-s-gi u-gv-wa-le-i tsu-li-ne-no-di tsu-wu-go-da-ne-di-yi di-nv-no-dv a-le tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi.

210406.english: For for this cause was the gospel preached also to them that are dead, that they might be judged according to men in the flesh, but live according to God in the spirit.
210406.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎨᎦᎵᏥᏙᏁᎴᎢ, ᏗᎨᎫᎪᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏴᏫ ᏧᏄᎪᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏧᏭᎪᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏗᏅᏃᏛ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏧᎾᏓᏛᏙᎩᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
210406.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no i-yu-s-di o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi na-s-quo ge-ga-li-tsi-do-ne-le-i, di-ge-gu-go-da-ne-di-yi u-que-da-li ge-sv na-s-gi-ya yv-wi tsu-nu-go-do-di ge-sv-i, U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni tsu-wu-go-do-di ge-sv di-nv-no-dv i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi tsu-na-da-dv-do-gi-hi ge-sv-i.

210407.english: But the end of all things is at hand: be ye therefore sober, and watch unto prayer.
210407.cherokee: ᏄᏓᎴᏒᏍᎩᏂ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᏗᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᎵᏏᎾᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᏯᏫᏍᎬ ᎢᏣᏓᏙᏓᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
210407.phonetic: Nu-da-le-sv-s-gi-ni go-hu-s-di u-li-s-qua-di-di, na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-tsa-li-si-na-hi-s-di ge-se-s-di, a-le i-tsi-ya-wi-s-gv i-tsa-da-do-da-s-di-s-ge-s-di.

210408.english: And above all things have fervent charity among yourselves: for charity shall cover the multitude of sins.
210408.cherokee: ᎠᎴ Ꮀ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᏕᏣᏓᎨᏳᏎᏍᏗ; ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗᏰᏃ ᎨᏒ ᏓᎫᏢᏂ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏯᏍᎦᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
210408.phonetic: A-le ho u-gv-wi-yu-se-s-di u-li-ni-gi-dv de-tsa-da-ge-yu-se-s-di; a-da-ge-yu-di-ye-no ge-sv da-gu-tlv-ni u-tsa-ti i-ya-s-ga-nv-i-s-di ge-sv-i.

210409.english: Use hospitality one to another without grudging.

210410.english: As every man hath received the gift, even so minister the same one to another, as good stewards of the manifold grace of God.
210410.cherokee: ᏂᏥᎥᏃ ᎡᏥᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᏣᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗ ᎠᏃᏍᏛ ᎨᏥᎦᏘᏗᏍᏗ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎬᏩᎦᏗᏯ ᎤᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
210410.phonetic: Ni-tsi-v-no e-tsi-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi, na-s-gi de-tsa-da-ne-he-s-di na-s-gi-ya i-yu-na-dv-ne-di a-no-s-dv ge-tsi-ga-ti-di-s-di tsu-da-le-nv-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi gv-wa-ga-di-ya u-da-ne-di ge-sv-i.

210411.english: If any man speak, let him speak as the oracles of God; if any man minister, let him do it as of the ability which God giveth: that God in all things may be glorified through Jesus Christ, to whom be praise and dominion for ever and ever. Amen.
210411.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎦᏬᏂᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏄᏪᏒ ᎦᏬᏂᏍᎨᏍᏗ.  ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᏓᏯᏙᎮᎮᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏰᎵ ᎢᎬᏩᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎲ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏕᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎢᎬᏩᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᏱᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏱᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.  ᎡᎺᏅ.
210411.phonetic: I-yu-no gi-lo ga-wo-ni-s-ge-s-di, na-s-gi-ya U-ne-la-nv-hi nu-we-sv ga-wo-ni-s-ge-s-di.  I-yu-no gi-lo da-ya-do-he-he-s-di, na-s-gi ye-li i-gv-wa-dv-ne-di ge-sv u-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-hv U-ne-la-nv-hi na-s-gi na-dv-ne-he-s-di; na-s-gi-no U-ne-la-nv-hi ni-ga-v de-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv a-tsi-lv-quo-di-yu i-gv-wa-li-s-do-di yi-gi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv ge-sv yi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha; na-s-gi u-tse-li-ga ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv a-le u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv ni-go-hi-lv u-li-s-qua-di-s-di ni-ge-sv-na.  E-me-nv.

210412.english: Beloved, think it not strange concerning the fiery trial which is to try you, as though some strange thing happened unto you:
210412.cherokee: ᎢᏨᎨᏳᎢ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏱᏥᏰᎸᏎᏍᏗ ᎦᎵᎬ ᏥᏥᏱᎵᏕᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᎪᎵᏰᏗ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏥᏥᎷᏤᎶᎢ;
210412.phonetic: I-tsv-ge-yu-i, tle-s-di u-s-qua-ni-go-di yi-tsi-ye-lv-se-s-di ga-li-gv tsi-tsi-yi-li-de-ha na-s-gi i-tsi-go-li-ye-di tsi-gi, na-s-gi-ya go-hu-s-di u-s-qua-ni-go-di tsi-tsi-lu-tse-lo-i;

210413.english: But rejoice, inasmuch as ye are partakers of Christ's sufferings; that, when his glory shall be revealed, ye may be glad also with exceeding joy.
210413.cherokee: ᎢᏣᎵᎮᎵᎨᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᎩᎵᏲᏨ ᎢᏤᎳᏗᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏣᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏣᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
210413.phonetic: I-tsa-li-he-li-ge-s-di-s-gi-ni nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di Ga-lo-ne-dv u-gi-li-yo-tsv i-tse-la-di-s-di-s-gv-i, na-s-gi-no u-tse-li ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv gv-ni-ge-sv i-gv-ne-lv-hi ge-se-s-di ni-hi na-s-quo u-tsa-ta-nv-hi ge-tsa-li-he-li-s-di ge-se-s-di.

210414.english: If ye be reproached for the name of Christ, happy are ye; for the spirit of glory and of God resteth upon you: on their part he is evil spoken of, but on your part he is glorified.
210414.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎦᏰᏥᏐᏢᏕᏍᏗ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏚᏙᎥ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᏓᏅᏙᏰᏃ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎢᏤᎳᏗᏙᎭ; ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎬᏩᏐᏢᏗ, ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᎭ.
210414.phonetic: I-yu-no ga-ye-tsi-so-tlv-de-s-di Ga-lo-ne-dv du-do-v nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di o-si-yu i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di ge-se-s-di, A-da-nv-do-ye-no ga-lv-quo-di-yu U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga i-tse-la-di-do-ha; na-s-gi na ge-sv ga-gv-wa-so-tlv-di, ni-hi-s-gi-ni ge-sv a-tsi-lv-quo-di-ha.

210415.english: But let none of you suffer as a murderer, or as a thief, or as an evildoer, or as a busybody in other men's matters.
210415.cherokee: ᎠᏗᎾ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᏂᎯ ᏂᏣᏛᏅ ᏳᎩᎵᏲᏤᏍᏗ ᏴᏫ ᎤᎸᎢ ᏳᏍᏛᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏃᏍᎩᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏌᎳᏁᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
210415.phonetic: A-di-na tle-s-di gi-lo ni-hi ni-tsa-dv-nv yu-gi-li-yo-tse-s-di yv-wi u-lv-i yu-s-dv-di-s-ge-s-di, a-le u-no-s-gi-sv-i, a-le u-yo du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-i, a-le u-li-sa-la-ne-hi ge-sv nv-wa-na-da-le tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i.

210416.english: Yet if any man suffer as a Christian, let him not be ashamed; but let him glorify God on this behalf.
210416.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎩᎶ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏍᏛᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎩᎵᏲᎨᏍᏗ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏯᏕᎰᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᏫᎦᎸᏉᏓᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏫᏂᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ.
210416.phonetic: I-yu-s-gi-ni gi-lo Ga-lo-ne-dv a-s-da-wa-di-do-hi ge-sv u-s-dv-di-s-ge-s-di a-gi-li-yo-ge-s-di, tle-s-di ya-de-ho-s-ge-s-di, wi-ga-lv-quo-da-quo-s-gi-ni U-ne-la-nv-hi na-s-gi wi-ni-ga-li-s-do-da.

210417.english: For the time is come that judgment must begin at the house of God: and if it first begin at us, what shall the end be of them that obey not the gospel of God?
210417.cherokee: ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎲᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎫᎪᏙᏘ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᎤᏓᎴᏅᏗᏱ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏴ ᏰᎦᎴᏅᏔᏅ ᎦᏙ ᎤᏍᏗ ᏭᎾᎵᏱᎶᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏄᏃᎯᏳᏒᎾ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ.
210417.phonetic: U-s-qua-lv-hv-ye-no na-s-gi di-gu-go-do-ti ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li a-da-ne-lv u-da-le-nv-di-yi; i-yu-no a-yv ye-ga-le-nv-ta-nv ga-do u-s-di wu-na-li-yi-lo-hi-s-di ge-se-s-di na-s-gi na nu-no-hi-yu-sv-na o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga.

210418.english: And if the righteous scarcely be saved, where shall the ungodly and the sinner appear?
210418.cherokee: ᎢᏳ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏅᏘ ᎤᏎᎦᏨᎯ ᎠᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎭᏢ ᏭᎾᏄᎪᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏂᏚᏁᎶᏛᎾ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᎦᎾᎢ.
210418.phonetic: I-yu a-le u-da-nv-ti u-se-ga-tsv-hi a-tsi-s-de-lv-di ge-se-s-di, ha-tlv wu-na-nu-go-i-s-di ge-se-s-di u-ne-la-nv-hi ni-du-ne-lo-dv-na a-le a-s-ga-na-i.

210419.english: Wherefore let them that suffer according to the will of God commit the keeping of their souls to him in well doing, as unto a faithful Creator.
210419.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏂᎩᎵᏲᎩ, ᏫᏓᏂᏲᎯᏏ ᏧᏍᏆᏂᎪᏙᏗᏱ ᏧᎾᏓᏅᏙ, ᎣᏍᏛ ᏕᎤᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏓᎵᏓᏍᏛᎾ ᎤᏬᏢᏅᏅᎯ ᏥᏓᏂᏲᎯᏎᎰᎢ.
210419.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di, na-s-gi na nu-s-dv a-da-nv-te-s-gv U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ni-gi-li-yo-gi, wi-da-ni-yo-hi-si tsu-s-qua-ni-go-do-di-yi tsu-na-da-nv-do, o-s-dv de-u-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i, na-s-gi-ya nu-da-li-da-s-dv-na U-wo-tlv-nv-nv-hi tsi-da-ni-yo-hi-se-ho-i.

210501.english: The elders which are among you I exhort, who am also an elder, and a witness of the sufferings of Christ, and also a partaker of the glory that shall be revealed:
210501.cherokee: ᏗᎨᎦᏁᎶᏗ ᏥᎨᏣᏓᏑᏯ ᎦᏥᏔᏲᏎᎭ, ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏨᏆᏁᎶᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏥᎦᏔᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᎩᎵᏲᏨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏇᏔᏗᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎬᏁᏗ ᏥᎩ^
210501.phonetic: Di-ge-ga-ne-lo-di tsi-ge-tsa-da-su-ya ga-tsi-ta-yo-se-ha, a-yv na-s-quo tsv-qua-ne-lo-di a-le tsi-ga-ta-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv u-gi-li-yo-tsv-i, a-le na-s-quo a-que-ta-di-s-di-s-gi ga-lv-quo-di-yu gv-ni-ge-sv i-gv-ne-di tsi-gi^

210502.english: Feed the flock of God which is among you, taking the oversight thereof, not by constraint, but willingly; not for filthy lucre, but of a ready mind;
210502.cherokee: ᏕᏤᎶᎮᏍᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏤᎵᎦ ᏥᎨᏣᏓᏑᏯ, ᏕᏥᎦᏘᏰᏍᏗ, ᎥᏞᏍᏗ ᎣᏏᏳ ᏂᏥᏰᎸᏒᎾ ᎣᏏᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏥᏰᎸᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏞᏍᏗ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎢᏥᎬᎥᏍᎬ ᏱᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎣᏏᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏥᏰᎸᏒ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ;
210502.phonetic: De-tse-lo-he-s-di u-na-da-tlu-gv U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-tse-li-ga tsi-ge-tsa-da-su-ya, de-tsi-ga-ti-ye-s-di, v-tle-s-di o-si-yu ni-tsi-ye-lv-sv-na o-si-yu-s-gi-ni i-tsi-ye-lv-hi ge-se-s-di, a-le v-tle-s-di tsu-gv-wa-lo-di i-tsi-gv-v-s-gv yi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di, o-si-yu-s-gi-ni i-tsi-ye-lv-sv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di;

210503.english: Neither as being lords over God's heritage, but being ensamples to the flock.
210503.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏕᏥᎦᏘᏴ [ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ] ᏧᏤᎵᎦ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎾᎾᏛᏁᎲ ᏱᏂᏣᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ, ᎦᎨᏣᏕᎶᏆᎡᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬᎢ.
210503.phonetic: A-le de-tsi-ga-ti-yv [U-ne-la-nv-hi] tsu-tse-li-ga tle-s-di u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi na-na-dv-ne-hv yi-ni-tsa-dv-ne-he-s-di, ga-ge-tsa-de-lo-qua-e-di-s-gi-ni ge-se-s-di na-s-gi u-na-da-tlu-gv-i.

210504.english: And when the chief Shepherd shall appear, ye shall receive a crown of glory that fadeth not away.
210504.cherokee: ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒᏃ ᎠᏫ-ᏗᎦᏘᏯ ᎦᎾᏄᎪᏥᎸᎭ ᎡᏥᏅᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᎠᎵᏍᏚᎶ ᎠᏍᎪᎸᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
210504.phonetic: Nu-gv-wi-yu-sv-no a-wi--di-ga-ti-ya ga-na-nu-go-tsi-lv-ha e-tsi-nv-ne-di ge-se-s-di ga-lv-quo-di a-li-s-du-lo a-s-go-lv-gi ni-ge-sv-na.

210505.english: Likewise, ye younger, submit yourselves unto the elder. Yea, all of you be subject one to another, and be clothed with humility: for God resisteth the proud, and giveth grace to the humble.
210505.cherokee: ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏥᏫᏅ ᏕᏦᎯᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᏧᎾᏛᏐᏅᎯ; ᎥᎥ, ᏂᏥᎥᎢ ᏕᏣᏓᏙᎯᏳᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏄᏬᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎠᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎤᎾᏢᏉᏗ ᏓᏡᏗᏍᎪᎢ, ᎤᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎬᏩᎦᏗᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏓᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎰᎢ.
210505.phonetic: Ni-hi na-s-quo i-tsi-wi-nv de-tso-hi-yu-se-s-di tsu-na-dv-so-nv-hi; V-v, ni-tsi-v-i de-tsa-da-do-hi-yu-se-s-di, a-le i-tsa-nu-wo-s-de-s-di u-da-do-li-s-di a-da-nv-da-di-s-di ge-sv-i; U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no u-na-tlv-quo-di da-tlu-di-s-go-i, u-na-da-do-li-s-di-s-gi-ni gv-wa-ga-di-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv da-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-ho-i.

210506.english: Humble yourselves therefore under the mighty hand of God, that he may exalt you in due time:
210506.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎤᏬᏰᏂ ᎭᏫᏂᏗᏢ ᏂᏣᏛᎾᏕᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎨᏥᏌᎳᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᏎᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎾᎯᏳᎢ.
210506.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-tsa-da-do-li-s-di ge-se-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi u-li-ni-gi-dv u-wo-ye-ni ha-wi-ni-di-tlv ni-tsa-dv-na-de-gv-i, na-s-gi-no ge-tsi-sa-la-do-di ge-se-s-di a-se-lv-hi ge-sv na-hi-yu-i.

210507.english: Casting all your care upon him; for he careth for you.
210507.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᎤᏪᎵᎯᏍᏗ ᎢᏤᎲ ᏤᏥᏲᎯᏏ, ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏖᏍᎪᎢ.
210507.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi ni-ga-di-yu u-we-li-hi-s-di i-tse-hv tse-tsi-yo-hi-si, na-s-gi-ye-no i-tsa-da-nv-te-s-go-i.

210508.english: Be sober, be vigilant; because your adversary the devil, as a roaring lion, walketh about, seeking whom he may devour:
210508.cherokee: ᎢᏣᎵᏏᎾᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎢᏥᏯᏫᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎢᏣᏡᏗᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎠᏍᎩᎾ, ᏢᏓᏥ ᎤᏃᏕᎾ ᎤᏪᎷᎩ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎡᏙᎭ ᏚᏲᎭ ᏧᏪᏰᏍᏗ.
210508.phonetic: I-tsa-li-si-na-hi-s-di ge-se-s-di, i-tsi-ya-wi-s-ge-s-di, i-tsa-tlu-di-s-gi-ye-no a-s-gi-na, tlv-da-tsi u-no-de-na u-we-lu-gi na-s-gi-ya e-do-ha du-yo-ha tsu-we-ye-s-di.

210509.english: Whom resist stedfast in the faith, knowing that the same afflictions are accomplished in your brethren that are in the world.
210509.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏤᏣᏟᏴᏏ, ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒᎢ, ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎭᏰᏃ ᎤᏠᏱ ᎠᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏂᎧᎵᎢᎲ ᎢᏣᎵᏅᏟ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏣᏁᎭ.
210509.phonetic: Na-s-gi tse-tsa-tli-yv-si, u-li-ni-gi-dv ge-se-s-di i-tso-hi-yu-sv-i, i-tsi-ga-ta-ha-ye-no u-tlo-yi a-gi-li-yo-i-s-di ge-sv a-ni-ka-li-i-hv i-tsa-li-nv-tli e-lo-hi tsa-ne-ha.

210510.english: But the God of all grace, who hath called us unto his eternal glory by Christ Jesus, after that ye have suffered a while, make you perfect, stablish, strengthen, settle you.
210510.cherokee: ᎠᏗᎾ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏣᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏣᏘ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎩᏯᏅᏛ ᏥᎩ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏫᎩᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᎬᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏞᎦ ᎢᏥᎩᎵᏲᏨᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏂᏥᎪᎸᎾ ᏫᏂᏨᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏫᏣᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏓ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᏫᏂᏨᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏰᏥᏖᎸᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏫᏂᏨᎦ.
210510.phonetic: A-di-na U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tsa-ta-nv-hi u-da-do-li-tsa-ti na-s-gi i-gi-ya-nv-dv tsi-gi u-tse-li u-li-s-qua-di-s-di ni-ge-sv-na ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv wi-gi-lu-hi-s-di-yi, Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv a-gv-di-s-gv-i, na-s-gi tle-ga i-tsi-gi-li-yo-tsv-hi ge-se-s-di, ni-tsi-go-lv-na wi-ni-tsv-ga, a-le wi-tsa-li-ni-go-hi-s-da, a-le i-tsa-li-ni-gi-dv wi-ni-tsv-ga, a-le ga-ye-tsi-te-lv-di ni-ge-sv-na wi-ni-tsv-ga.

210511.english: To him be glory and dominion for ever and ever. Amen.
210511.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.  ᎡᎺᏅ.
210511.phonetic: Na-s-gi u-tse-li ge-se-s-di ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv a-le u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv ni-go-hi-lv u-li-s-qua-di-s-di ni-ge-sv-na.  E-me-nv.

210512.english: By Silvanus, a faithful brother unto you, as I suppose, I have written briefly, exhorting, and testifying that this is the true grace of God wherein ye stand.
210512.cherokee: ᎢᏨᏲᏪᎳᏏ ᎦᏲᎵ ᏏᎷᏪᏂ ᎤᏅᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎳᏏᏛᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏣᎵᏅᏟ ᎦᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᎢ, ᎢᏒᏔᏲᏎᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᏨᏴᏁᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎾᎿᎭᏥᏕᏥᏙᎦ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
210512.phonetic: I-tsv-yo-we-la-si ga-yo-li Si-lu-we-ni u-nv-s-di na-s-gi ga-la-si-dv-di ni-ge-sv-na i-tsa-li-nv-tli ga-da-nv-te-s-gv-i, i-sv-ta-yo-se-ha, a-le gv-ni-ge-sv ni-tsv-yv-ne-ha na-s-gi hi-a na-hna tsi-de-tsi-do-ga u-do-hi-yu-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv-i.

210513.english: The church that is at Babylon, elected together with you, saluteth you; and so doth Marcus my son.
210513.cherokee: ᏓᏓᎶᏂ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎨᎦᏑᏰᏛ ᏂᎯ ᎡᏣᏑᏰᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ ᏫᎨᏥᏲᎵᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎹᎦ ᎠᏇᏥ.
210513.phonetic: Da-da-lo-ni a-ne-hi ge-ga-su-ye-dv ni-hi e-tsa-su-ye-dv ge-sv na-s-gi-ya-i wi-ge-tsi-yo-li-ha, a-le na-s-quo ma-ga a-que-tsi.

210514.english: Greet ye one another with a kiss of charity. Peace be with you all that are in Christ Jesus. Amen.
210514.cherokee: ᏕᏣᏓᏲᎵᎸᎭ ᎢᏨᏔᏅᎭ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᏗᏓᏙᏪᏙᎥᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.  ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎢᏤᎳᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ ᏂᏥᎥ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎡᏥᏯᎢ.  ᎡᎺᏅ
210514.phonetic: De-tsa-da-yo-li-lv-ha i-tsv-ta-nv-ha a-da-ge-yu-di di-da-do-we-do-v-s-di ge-sv-i.  Nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv i-tse-la-di-do-he-s-di ni-tsi-v Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv e-tsi-ya-i.  E-me-nv
